name: Lead Tracker — Make.com Bridge → Airtable
_purpose: Catches the output of Lujan + Saad's existing Make.com scenarios (Construction 4851014, Tourist 4552621, plus the three launching this weekend: Acquisitions Relaunch, Acquisitions Prequalified, Banks & Credit Unions). Add an HTTP module at the END of each Make scenario that POSTs the lead JSON to this webhook. That way each scenario keeps its own copy of the prospect-summary-email-to-Chris flow, and this workflow handles the dashboard-side write so we don't have to edit each scenario individually.
